reviews.notes: Solid implementation. Added 1122 lines across 4 files (SSE route, streaming generator lib, overlay updates, page integration). All spec requirements met. Pre-existing TS error in unrelated file not caused by this task. Non-streaming generator preserved as fallback.
Well-structured seed script with proper TypeScript types, error handling, and graceful duplicate checking. Added npm seed:templates command. Both duplicate files removed. Zero TypeScript errors.
Paywall correctly shows $19.99/mo. Simple, correct change.
MONETIZATION.md converted from GBP to USD. Pro at $19.99/mo correct throughout.
Free tier contractsPerMonth updated to 3 in rate-limits.ts.
Pre-existing checkAndResetUsage function verified in subscription/route.ts.
AIDisclaimer component exists with professional legal language. PDF disclaimer pre-existing.
Duplicate generator-streaming file removed. Only one remains.
Excellent STRIPE_WEBHOOKS.md: both endpoints documented with event tables, file paths, env vars, overlap warnings, and local testing with Stripe CLI. Production-ready.
Clear SENTRY_SETUP.md with 7-step checklist and documentation of what's already configured.
Tests well-structured but @playwright/test never installed as devDependency. 14 TS errors. npm scripts would fail. Re-queued: install dependency and verify.

Retry successful. @playwright/test@1.58.2 added as devDependency. All 14 Playwright TS errors resolved. Only remaining TS error is pre-existing Next.js async params issue (unrelated). Clean 1-line fix + lockfile.
Pre-existing sendWelcomeEmail in email.ts, triggered in auth/callback/route.ts.
All 4 pages have SEO metadata. Login/register use direct exports; about/contact correctly use layout.tsx files since pages are 'use client'.
Pre-existing comprehensive legal content on /terms and /privacy. ESIGN Act, GDPR covered.
Excellent DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md: env vars, Stripe, DNS/SSL, Supabase, email, post-deploy verification (11 checks), 48-hour monitoring plan.
